## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Claire Blood-Cheney and Marcel Santilli's company, Growth X, discussing their AI-powered content marketing services and Claire's potential interest in a Chief of Staff role.](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Growth X offers AI-powered content marketing services, starting at $9k/month, with a unique blend of AI workflows and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [The company is experiencing rapid growth, reaching \~$1M ARR in 3 months, and aims for $16-20M by end of next year](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Marcel is seeking a Chief of Staff to help systematize operations and manage growth-related tasks](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
  - [Claire expressed interest in potentially transitioning from her VC role to an operating role at a fast-moving startup like Growth X](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background and Growth X's Origin

  - [Career progression: IBM, HP, HashiCorp, ServiceTitan, Scale AI](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Consistent focus on content marketing throughout career](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Started Growth X after successful AI-powered content experiments at Deep Gram](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Rapid growth: From workshops to $130k contract with Ramp in 5 days](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Now at \~$1M ARR, 60% margins, profitable and generating cash](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)

### Growth X's Technology and Approach

  - [Custom knowledge bases for each client](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [AI components: Research agents, planning agent, writer, post-processing, cross-linkers, fact-checkers](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Human editing and review throughout the process](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [Strategist assigned to each account](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Challenges: Outgrowing existing tools, rebuilding runtime layer](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Future potential: API offerings (e.g., fact-checker), marketplace of AI+human talent](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Target Clients and Pricing

  - [ICP: Companies like Ramp and Hims (raising funds, need rapid content scaling)](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $9,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Suitable for seed-stage companies with funding](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Value proposition: VP-level strategy + editor expertise + advanced tech](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)

### Chief of Staff Role

  - [Responsibilities: Manage fundraising process, systematize operations, special projects](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
  - [Key areas: Building systems for scale, filling gaps, hiring (e.g., head of talent)](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
  - [Current setup: 2 EAs, but need higher-level management and strategic support](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)

### Claire's Background and Interest

  - [Current role: Neo (VC firm), managing accelerator program](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [Previous experience: Growth marketing at Atomic (Venture Studio)](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Expressed interest in transitioning back to an operating role at a fast-moving startup](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Claire to apply through Growth X's standard process (45 min total: video, assessment, questions)](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Marcel to fast-track Claire's application once submitted](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting on Monday to discuss further](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
  - [Explore potential Growth X collaborations with companies in Claire's network](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Claire to connect with Bob (mutual contact) for additional context on Growth X](https://fathom.video/share/xkmPyy39z71PsQGV17G7U8LjyPiw-sRw?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
